zh.Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Ha: 英國英格蘭哈普爾比曉普斯托可聖 馬也斯 亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Dillingham Sr.於1540年出生在英國貝德福爾迪恩時，他的父親Joshua Dillingham15歲，母親Elizabth Brooke14歲。他於1561年10月7日與Kathrina Marston在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1603年2月24日在英國萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾比曉普斯托可聖 馬也斯 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Dillingham Sr.于1540年出生在英国貝德福爾迪恩时，他的父亲Joshua Dillingham15岁，母亲Elizabth Brooke14岁。他于1561年10月7日与Kathrina Marston在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1603年2月24日在英国萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾比曉普斯托可聖 馬也斯 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Dillingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Bedfordshire): habitational name, probably from Dullingham in Cambridgeshire, recorded as Dolingeham in 1214 and Dillyngham in 1298, named in Old English as ‘homestead (Old English hām) of the people (-inga-) of Dull(a)’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When William Dillingham Sr. was born in 1540, in Dean, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Joshua Dillingham, was 15 and his mother, Elizabth Brooke, was 14. He married Kathrina Marston on 7 October 1561, in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 February 1603, in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Dillingham Sr. est né en 1540, à Dean, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Joshua Dillingham, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Elizabth Brooke, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Kathrina Marston le 7 octobre 1561, à Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 février 1603, à Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Dillingham Sr. è nato il nel 1540 nel Dean, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Joshua Dillingham, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Elizabth Brooke, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Kathrina Marston il 7 ottobre 1561, nel Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William Dillingham Sr.が1540年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアディーンで生まれた時，父Joshua Dillinghamは15歳，母Elizabth Brookeは14歳であった。1561年10月7日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコテスバチでKathrina Marstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1603年2月24日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコテスバチで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアビショプストクサイント マリ'ス チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Ha: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 비숍스토크 세인트 마이'스 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: William Dillingham Sr.(이)가 1540년 영국 베드퍼드실르 디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joshua Dillingham(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabth Brooke(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1561년 10월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 컷스바치에서 Kathrina Marston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1603년 2월 24일 영국 레이스스터실르 컷스바치에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 비숍스토크 세인트 마이'스 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Dillingham Sr. nasceu em 1540, em Dean, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Joshua Dillingham, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Elizabth Brooke, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Kathrina Marston em 7 de outubro de 1561, em Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1603, em Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Ha: сеинт мэри'с чурчярд, бишопсток, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Dillingham Sr. родился в 1540 г. в местности дин, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Joshua Dillingham было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabth Brooke, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Kathrina Marston 7 октября 1561 г. в местности котесбач, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 февраля 1603 г. в местности котесбач, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт мэри'с чурчярд, бишопсток, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.
